scripts.build: npm run build -w @smartreception/shared && npm run build -w @smartreception/backend && npm run build -w @smartreception/frontend
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build -w @smartreception/shared && npm run db:generate -w @smartreception/backend && npm run build -w @smartreception/backend && VITE_API_URL=/api/v1 npm run build -w @smartreception/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @smartreception/backend && npm run lint -w @smartreception/frontend
